problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
